title: Home Again
description: The workshop welcomes you back, but everything has changed.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: The workshop unchanged—gears on tables, tools on racks, half-finished projects gathering dust.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: It feels like we've been gone for years.

opening.speaker: Father
opening.text: Only a week. But you're right. Everything feels different now.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: He cleans up, putting away his temporal research.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: What will you work on now?

opening.speaker: Father
opening.text: Simple things. Useful things. No more playing with forces I don't fully understand.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Does this mean no more adventures?

opening.speaker: Father
opening.text: *laughs* I think you've all had quite enough adventure for a while.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: Evening. Sunset through the workshop windows. Father calls you to his workbench.

closing.speaker: Father
closing.text: I have something for you. I've been working on it for months, but... I think now is the right time.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: A small music box. Intricate, beautiful.

closing.speaker: Father
closing.text: It was your mother's favorite melody. I've been trying to recreate it from memory. I'm not sure I got it right, but...

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: He winds it up. Gentle melody fills the workshop. Never heard before, yet familiar. Safe. Home.

choices.text: Listen quietly as father shares memories of mother.
Ask questions, learn everything you can about who she was.

puzzle.title: Echoes of Yesterday
puzzle.instructions: The music box plays. Listen. Remember. This is part of who you are.
